q-matelotagewp-matelotagenœuddechaiseint.stem: What does the text confirm about the bowline when it is not under tension?
choices: It is easy to undo, even when wet and after having been subjected to a very strong pull or to tightening caused by drying out.
It becomes impossible to undo as soon as it gets wet.
It can only be adjusted by applying strong tension to the standing part.
q-matelotagewp-matelotagenœuddechaiseint.explanation: According to Matelotage — Nœud de chaise : Intérêts, when not under tension it is easy to undo even when wet and after a strong pull.

q-matelotagewp-matelotagenœuddechaiseint.stem: According to the text, how does the bowline react when tension increases?
choices: The stronger the tension, the more it locks, while still untying just as easily.
The stronger the tension, the more it tends to slip and come undone.
Tension has no effect on its locking, which depends on an intermediate mechanical system.
q-matelotagewp-matelotagenœuddechaiseint.explanation: According to Matelotage — Nœud de chaise : Intérêts, the stronger the tension, the more the knot locks and the more easily it unties.

q-matelotagewp-matelotagenœuddechaisepré.stem: According to the text, the bowline is also called:
choices: Bowline knot (nœud de bouline).
Clove hitch.
Hangman's knot.
q-matelotagewp-matelotagenœuddechaisepré.explanation: According to Matelotage — Nœud de chaise : Présentation, the bowline is also called the nœud de bouline.

q-matelotagewp-matelotagenœuddechaiseroi.stem: Why is the bowline described as the king of knots, according to the text?
choices: It is a reliable loop knot that does not slip under tension and unties easily even after strong tension.
It is the only knot that is impossible to untie once tightened.
It can only be made with a specialized tool and with two hands.
q-matelotagewp-matelotagenœuddechaiseroi.explanation: According to Matelotage — Nœud de chaise : Roi des nœuds, its quality as a reliable loop knot that does not slip and unties easily justifies it.

q-matelotagewp-matelotagenœuddechaiseroi.stem: Regarding the methods for making the bowline, which statement(s) does the text confirm?
choices: There are several methods for making it, up to 18 including the variants.
Only two classic methods are recognized for teaching, knitted or prepared.
A single unique method of making it is accepted throughout the world.
q-matelotagewp-matelotagenœuddechaiseroi.explanation: According to Matelotage — Nœud de chaise : Roi des nœuds, there are up to 18 methods including variants but two classic teaching methods.

q-matelotagewp-matelotagenœudlienganses-.stem: According to the text, what is a bight (ganse)?
choices: A curved portion of rope, with no crossing or overlapping.
A tight crossing of two rope ends.
A rope braided from three metal strands.
q-matelotagewp-matelotagenœudlienganses-.explanation: According to Matelotage — Nœud (lien) : Ganses, a bight is a curved portion of rope with no crossing or overlapping.

q-matelotagewp-matelotagenœudlienganses-.stem: According to the text, what does the hangman's knot illustrate regarding bight knots?
choices: It can be easily undone if the loop is free, but tightens around the restraint under the weight of the hanged person.
It can never be undone, whether the loop is free or restrained.
It loosens automatically as soon as weight is applied to the loop.
q-matelotagewp-matelotagenœudlienganses-.explanation: According to Matelotage — Nœud (lien) : Ganses, the hangman's knot comes undone if the loop is free but tightens under the weight of the hanged person.

q-matelotagewp-matelotagenœudlienproprié.stem: According to the text, which criterion makes it possible to evaluate and choose the most suitable knot?
choices: The strength of the knot, in particular whether or not it weakens the rope in case of violent jerks.
The color of the rope used to make it.
The purchase price of the cord.
q-matelotagewp-matelotagenœudlienproprié.explanation: According to Matelotage — Nœud (lien) : Propriétés, the strength of the knot is paramount, especially in case of violent jerks.

q-matelotagewp-matelotagenœudlienproprié.stem: According to the text, what is the strength of a rope fitted with a bowline compared to a clove hitch?
choices: The bowline retains an exceptional strength of 89%, whereas the clove hitch halves it.
The clove hitch retains 89% of the strength, against half for the bowline.
Both knots reduce the rope's strength by exactly half.
q-matelotagewp-matelotagenœudlienproprié.explanation: According to Matelotage — Nœud (lien) : Propriétés, the clove hitch reduces strength by half whereas the bowline reaches 89%.

q-matelotagewp-matelotagenœudlienprésent.stem: According to the text, which statement about the use of knots is correct?
choices: The art of knots mainly developed in sailing vessels and then in sport or leisure boating.
Knots have never been used outside the maritime domain.
Knowledge of knots has become completely useless since the appearance of specialized equipment.
q-matelotagewp-matelotagenœudlienprésent.explanation: According to Matelotage — Nœud (lien) : Présentation, knots developed in sailing vessels and then in boating.

q-matelotagewp-matelotagenœudlienprésent.stem: According to the text, what is a knot?
choices: The intertwining or interlacing of one or more ropes or other flexible, thread-like objects.
Exclusively the interlacing of two rigid metal cables.
An assembly of planks intended to reinforce a hull.
q-matelotagewp-matelotagenœudlienprésent.explanation: According to Matelotage — Nœud (lien) : Présentation, a knot is the intertwining or interlacing of flexible, thread-like objects.
